action_instruction: Checking whether the main product detail section shows the product name "Nike Air Max Pro".
intent: PRIMARY: is the product name visible/present in the main product detail section (the large title "Nike Air Max Pro")? Answer true or false.

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is the product name visible/present in the main product detail section (the large title "Nike Air Max Pro")? Answer true or false.
